Localization.Description: A user renamed a file or folder in a file share

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} renamed the file {object.name} to {object.new_value} in a file share on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} renamed the folder {object.name} to {object.new_value} in a file share on host {event_src.host}
